data.name: Dorm Janitor's Revenge
data.detailed_description:
Start as a broke and humiliated janitor, living in a women's dormitory.

Plan and optimize your day-to-day activities throughout the week, like Persona games, but filled with kinky Femdom. Grind and strategize your way forward, or surrender your fate into their hands!

Learn what goes on inside a girls' dorm and discover steamy secrets as you manage your day-to-day life full of frustration. Struggle and endure the cozy yet unforgiving dorm while adapting to the changes. Find various ways to exploit your position, or get exploited.

Interact with characters full of personalities and take part in their kinkiest requests. Uncover their dirty nature and engage in nasty activities. Every choice may reveal something different and impact your overall experience, whether it’s dignified or degrading. With fun and short dialogues and encounters, enjoy a punchy premise.

Buy and sell various spicy stuff to aid your schemes, and conduct profitable side hustles. While engaging in devious acts, maintain a low profile and pay your rents as you explore. Either dominate, or submit and let them make you their little toy!

Hidden variables and switches may keep track of what you do and reflect the game based on your behavior. Depending on your choices, you may branch out to different routes leading to dark, fulfilling, or even secret endings. There is also a bit of roguelike-randomness involved to keep each playthrough fresh.

Experience an old-school RPG with modern retro pixel art!

Warning! This game is not a casual click-and-jerk!

It has a slow start, and requires careful consideration and exploitation of the game mechanics, which may frustrate some players and lead to rage-quitting! Please check the FAQs for more info.

data.short_description: Experience an old-school RPG in a female-dominated slice-of-life setting. Live the life of a broke and humiliated janitor living in a girls' dormitory. Interact with the ladies, explore various kinks, exploit, and make choices that lead to your prime goal or an entirely different ending.
data.supported_languages:
英文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7/8/8.1/10 (32-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo (or Equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: DirectX 9/OpenGL 4.1 capable GPU
  • DirectX: 版本：9.0
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: It should run on most low end computers.
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Windows 10 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3-2100 (or Equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with OpenGL 4.1 support
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 2 MB 可用空間
  • 備註: Play the demo to ensure if it's compatible if you have a custom machine.

mac_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 10.13
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (or Equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.1 compatible
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Play the demo to ensure if it's compatible.
mac_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: macOS 11 (Big Sur)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i5
  • 記憶體: 8 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with OpenGL 4.1 support or better
  • 儲存空間: 3 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Play the demo to ensure if it's compatible.

linux_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 16.04 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core 2 Duo (or Equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 2 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: OpenGL 4.1 compatible GPU
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Play the demo to ensure if it's compatible.
linux_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 作業系統: Ubuntu 20.04 (64-bit)
  • 處理器: Intel Core i3 (or Equivalent)
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Dedicated GPU with OpenGL 4.1 support
  • 儲存空間: 2 GB 可用空間
  • 備註: Play the demo to ensure if it's compatible if you have a custom machine.
